evals.prompt: I want to auto-generate Qwilr proposals whenever a deal hits Stage 3 (Proposal) in HubSpot. We sell a SaaS collaboration platform with per-seat pricing ($50-150/seat/year depending on tier). I need the proposal to pull company name, contact name, deal amount, seat count, and product tier from HubSpot. The proposal template should have an executive summary, a scope section, an interactive quote block with the seat pricing, and a case study. We have 8 reps doing about 30 proposals a month. Walk me through the full setup.
evals.expected_output: A complete automation guide covering the architecture choice (native HubSpot integration vs. API), step-by-step setup including API calls for page creation with token substitutions from HubSpot deal fields, webhook configuration for tracking engagement, and a testing checklist.

assertions.name: has_architecture_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends native integration vs. API with trade-offs for HubSpot specifically

assertions.name: has_api_calls
assertions.description: Includes actual API call examples for POST /pages with token substitutions

assertions.name: has_token_mapping
assertions.description: Maps HubSpot deal fields to Qwilr template tokens

assertions.name: has_testing_checklist
assertions.description: Includes steps to verify the end-to-end automation works

evals.prompt: Set up Qwilr webhooks so I get notified in Slack when someone views or accepts a proposal.
evals.expected_output: Webhook setup instructions with the specific POST /webhooks API call, which events to subscribe to (pageFirstViewed, pageViewed, pageAccepted), and how to connect to Slack (via Zapier or direct webhook-to-Slack integration).

assertions.name: has_webhook_setup
assertions.description: Includes the POST /webhooks API call with correct event names

assertions.name: has_slack_integration
assertions.description: Shows how to connect Qwilr webhook events to Slack notifications

assertions.name: has_event_selection
assertions.description: Explains which webhook events to use and why

evals.prompt: I use Salesforce and want to connect it to Qwilr. We have a 15-person sales team generating about 40 proposals per month. We want to auto-create proposals from opportunity data (account name, contact, amount, product line, close date) and sync proposal view/acceptance status back to Salesforce. We also want reps to be able to manually trigger proposal creation from the opportunity record. What's the best approach — native integration, Zapier, or API? Walk me through the setup for whichever you recommend.
evals.expected_output: A comparison of all three approaches for Salesforce specifically, with trade-offs around complexity, customization, and cost. Should include a recommendation based on common use cases and a setup guide for the recommended approach.

assertions.name: has_comparison
assertions.description: Compares native Salesforce integration, Zapier, and direct API with pros/cons

assertions.name: has_recommendation
assertions.description: Makes a clear recommendation based on the user's situation

assertions.name: has_setup_steps
assertions.description: Provides actionable setup steps for at least the recommended approach
